misc.title: #ONEPIECE1189] WE FOUND THE Xingtian Axe that Imu is using from one of the 19 kings that Imu is using!!!! It was in the throne room on the left side of Imu , behind two swords!!
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1189] WE FOUND THE Xingtian Axe that Imu is using from one of the 19 kings that Imu is using!!!! It was in the throne room on the left side of Imu , behind two swords!!

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1189 Gaban is so fast: He leaps between Luffy and Imu, blocking Imu’s axe, and the chapter ends with their axes clashing, I can feel it, Gaban’s big moment is just around the corner... But I
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1189 Gaban is so fast: He leaps between Luffy and Imu, blocking Imu’s axe, and the chapter ends with their axes clashing, I can feel it, Gaban’s big moment is just around the corner... But I also fear for Gaban’s life; he bears all the signs of death flags...😭

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1189 When we look at all the weapons, could Nemesis actually be the only Black Blade that Imu possesses (inherited from a previous king or his own weapon)? Since he summons it, that implies i
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1189 When we look at all the weapons, could Nemesis actually be the only Black Blade that Imu possesses (inherited from a previous king or his own weapon)? Since he summons it, that implies it could be a Black Blade like the ones Mihawk or Ryuma wielded, right?

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1189 Sommers gets the sword, Kilingham the spear, Luffy wings facing opponents with a sword and spear... Luffy's wings are his weapon, everything make sense...🙌
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1189 Sommers gets the sword, Kilingham the spear, Luffy wings facing opponents with a sword and spear... Luffy's wings are his weapon, everything make sense...🙌

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1189 Just how insanely powerful must Joyboy have been to go up against Imu and the 19 Kings and their overpowered weapons? When Imu said that Luffy, an Emperor, was too weak to be Joyboy, he
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1189 Just how insanely powerful must Joyboy have been to go up against Imu and the 19 Kings and their overpowered weapons? When Imu said that Luffy, an Emperor, was too weak to be Joyboy, he certainly wasn't exaggerating. Joyboy was an absolute monster.

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1189 Imu summons all his weapons from the throne room; these weapons belonged to the 19 previous kings! In a flashback, Shanks also mentioned to Loki that the battle against the "King of the
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1189 Imu summons all his weapons from the throne room; these weapons belonged to the 19 previous kings! In a flashback, Shanks also mentioned to Loki that the battle against the "King of the World" would take place soon. The chapter title alludes to both.

misc.text: TV Anime "BLEACH: Thousand-Year Blood War - The Calamity -" (Cour 4) is listed for ONLY 10 EPISODES in total ! The ‘Final Part’, directed by Hikaru Murata at Studio PIERROT FILMS, is scheduled to premiere July 25.

items.text: #ONEPIECE1189 Gaban is so fast: He leaps between Luffy and Imu, blocking Imu’s axe, and the chapter ends with their axes clashing, I can feel it, Gaban’s big moment is just around the corner... But I also fear for Gaban’s life; he bears all the signs of death flags...😭

items.text: #ONEPIECE1189 When we look at all the weapons, could Nemesis actually be the only Black Blade that Imu possesses (inherited from a previous king or his own weapon)? Since he summons it, that implies it could be a Black Blade like the ones Mihawk or Ryuma wielded, right?

items.title: #ONEPIECE1189 Just how insanely powerful must Joyboy have been to go up against Imu and the 19 Kings and their overpowered weapons? When Imu said that Luffy, an Emperor, was too weak to be Joyboy, he
items.text: #ONEPIECE1189 Just how insanely powerful must Joyboy have been to go up against Imu and the 19 Kings and their overpowered weapons? When Imu said that Luffy, an Emperor, was too weak to be Joyboy, he certainly wasn't exaggerating. Joyboy was an absolute monster.

items.title: #ONEPIECE1189 Imu summons all his weapons from the throne room; these weapons belonged to the 19 previous kings! In a flashback, Shanks also mentioned to Loki that the battle against the "King of the
items.text: #ONEPIECE1189 Imu summons all his weapons from the throne room; these weapons belonged to the 19 previous kings! In a flashback, Shanks also mentioned to Loki that the battle against the "King of the World" would take place soon. The chapter title alludes to both.
